message:
Add comprehensive color downgrade edge case tests

Tests for the truecolor -> 256 -> 16 -> mono downgrade pipeline:

Sequential downgrade verification:
- Full pipeline from truecolor to mono
- Color intent preservation through downgrades

rgb_to_256 edge cases:
- Grayscale boundary values (0-7, 8, 248-249, 255)
- Grayscale ramp coverage (232-255)
- 6x6x6 cube corners
- Non-gray values avoiding grayscale

cube_index boundaries:
- Threshold values at 47/48, 114/115, etc.

ansi256_to_rgb edge cases:
- Full range sanity check
- Grayscale range produces r=g=b
- First 16 match palette

rgb_to_ansi16 edge cases:
- Pure primary colors
- Gray values
- Extremes (black/white)

rgb_to_mono edge cases:
- Luminance boundary at 128
- BT.709 weighted luminance
- Color saturation irrelevance

Downgrade stability tests:
- Same-level downgrade is identity
- Lower fidelity passes through higher

Luminance tests:
- BT.709 formula correctness
- Mid-range value verification

Closes bd-2nu8.7.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scope:
- Click, drag/move, scroll wheel.
- Verify event decoding and hit-testing behavior (widgets + hit grid).

Acceptance:
- Dedicated script + expected output/fixtures.
- Logs include PTY capture + structured JSON summary.
